_publications._publicationTitle: Basement membrane proteins in extracellular matrix characterize NF1 neurofibroma development and response to MEK inhibitor.

_contextSnippet: We also found that the number of macrophages was much higher in pNF compared with normal DRG tissue
details: Successfully used for quantitative analysis of immunofluorescence images to measure macrophage numbers and TGF-β1 expression levels
